data.name: Vivid Days
data.detailed_description:
Your laptop crashes at the worst moment, leaving you scrambling to meet photo-editing deadlines. As your Landlady and Landlord face a messy breakup, a vibrant world of steamy romance and bold choices opens up in Vivid Days, an adult visual novel pulsing with 80s-inspired vibes.

Try the free demo now!

Key Features:

  • Stunning 3D graphics with a unique, evocative style

  • 2,000+ images and 100+ animations

  • 5–7 hours of gameplay with multiple playthroughs

  • Immersive 80s-inspired soundtrack and atmospheric sound design

  • Branching narrative with impactful choices

  • Lewd scenes with diverse romantic encounters

  • Scene gallery to relive your favorite moments

Vivid Days contains graphic sexual content, including:

  • Oral Sex

  • Anal Sex

  • Vaginal Sex

  • Masturbation

  • Voyeurism

  • Teasing

  • Cumshots

  • Facial

  • Exhibitionism

  • Creampies

Player discretion is strongly advised.

Meet alluring women, flirt, date, and ignite steamy connections in a rich, choice-driven story. Your decisions shape intimate relationships and unlock multiple endings filled with NSFW moments.

Add Vivid Days to your Wishlist to stay updated on spicy new content!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
